name: Facial Cleansing Brush
description: Waterproof and rechargeable facial cleansing brush for cleansing, exfoliating, and massaging. Suitable for men and women.

name: LED Vanity Mirror
description: Trifold vanity mirror with LED lights, 2X/3X/10X magnification, touch control, and dual power supply.

name: Hair Dryer
description: Professional ionic hair dryer with fast drying, low noise design, lightweight body, and high-speed airflow.

name: Makeup Organizer
description: Makeup organizer for vanity with two large drawers, cosmetic display case, brush holders, and easy storage for skincare and perfume.

name: Electric Toothbrush
description: Rechargeable electric toothbrush with three cleaning modes, visual pressure sensor, two brush heads, and travel case.

name: Minimalist Table Lamp
description: Modern cordless table lamp set with rechargeable battery, portable LED lighting for bedroom, dining room, restaurants, and camping.

name: Decorative Vase
description: Modern hand-blown glass vase with elegant design for flowers, home decoration, and table centerpieces.

name: Memory Foam Seat Cushion
description: Memory foam ergonomic seat cushion with velvet cover designed for office chairs, cars, and long sitting comfort.

name: Wall Clock
description: Large decorative wall clock with light sensor, glow-in-the-dark design, and silent non-ticking movement.

name: Air Purifier
description: Large room air purifier with washable HEPA filters designed to reduce pet dander, odors, smoke, dust, and allergens.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle designed to keep drinks hot or cold for extended periods.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board
description: Premium bamboo cutting board set with deep juice grooves and side handles for meal prep, chopping, and serving.

name: Digital Kitchen Scale
description: Digital rechargeable kitchen scale with stainless steel surface, LCD display, and precise measurements for cooking and baking.

name: Glass Storage Container
description: Hard shell storage organizer with dividers designed for glassware, crystal glasses, and kitchen storage.

name: Coffee Grinder
description: Portable manual coffee grinder with adjustable settings and ceramic burr for coffee preparation at home or travel.

name: Pet Grooming Brush
description: 3-in-1 steam grooming brush with self-cleaning spray and mist function designed for removing loose pet hair.

name: Pet Water Fountain
description: Large stainless steel automatic pet water fountain with a wide drinking area and water level window.

name: Dog Bed
description: Comfortable donut-style pet bed with removable washable cover and soft plush material.

name: Cat Scratching Post
description: Interactive scratching post with hanging toys and durable scratching surface for indoor cats.

name: Pet Food Container
description: Airtight food container with wheels designed to keep pet food fresh and easy to access.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: 15W magnetic wireless charger compatible with iPhone and AirPods featuring fast charging technology.

name: USB-C Hub
description: 7-in-1 multi-port USB-C hub with HDMI, USB ports, SD/TF card reader, and fast charging support.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with long battery life and wireless connectivity for indoor and outdoor use.

name: Phone Stand
description: Adjustable and foldable phone stand for desk use with portable design and universal compatibility.

name: Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with noise cancelling, pure bass sound, clear calls, and water resistance.
